headline: Environmental Education Module Added to 200 Schools as Pilot
context: MOE launched a pilot environmental literacy program in 200 schools in 2025 ahead of potential national rollout.

cards.big: Environmental education pilot reaches 200 of 10,200 schools covering only 2% of students
cards.sub: Program includes climate science waste management and biodiversity conservation

cards.big: Only 15% of Malaysian students could explain greenhouse effect correctly in 2025 assessment
cards.sub: Climate literacy is critically low despite Malaysia's vulnerability to climate impacts

cards.big: Pilot program allocates only 2 hours monthly far below the 4 hours experts recommend
cards.sub: Time allocation reflects competition with existing overloaded curriculum

cards.big: Costa Rica mandated environmental education across all grades since 2015 reaching 1.2M students
cards.sub: National commitment transformed student environmental awareness within 5 years

cards.big: A generation that does not understand climate change cannot be expected to survive it
Should environmental education be a compulsory standalone subject in all Malaysian schools
